content:
- Manual verification is complete with a corrected `set -euo pipefail` shell block: both scripts generated fixture-matching SQL, dry-run wrote nothing, and invalid YAML exited non-zero with the expected readable errors.
- `make check`, `make lint`, and `make test` all passed. The workspace test lane also exercised the new `setup_sql_script_contract` integration tests and the existing Go verifyservice lane.
- The task markdown is now marked completed with `<passes>true</passes>`, Ralph task switching has been run, and next I am staging the full worktree for the required task-finished commit and push.

- Read previous progress log entry showing the last completed task passed make check/lint/test and task switching had already run.
- Opened the list-active-tasks skill and current task summaries; active backlog currently shows story-29 tasks 01-05 and story-30 task 01 all failing.
- Next I need to inspect chooser rules, blocker tags, and the actual repo stack so I can select the correct next task and write it to .ralph/current_task.txt.

- Read the chooser rules, active task definitions, Cargo workspace, and Makefile to determine the actual current stack.
- Confirmed the repo is currently a Rust workspace with cargo-based checks/tests plus a Go verifyservice test lane, and there are no Nix/flake files yet.
- Resolved task gating: no active failing bug tasks, no <blocked_by> tags on story-29/story-30 candidates, and no priority tags among those candidates.
- The most logical next task is story-29 task 01 because Nix is not installed/configured in the repo or VM yet, and that environment bootstrap unlocks the rest of the crane/Nix migration chain more directly than story-30 optimization.
- Next I should write .ralph/tasks/story-29-migrate-to-nix-crane/01-task-install-nix-on-this-vm.md into .ralph/current_task.txt and quit immediately.

- Read prior Ralph progress, confirmed the active task path is .ralph/tasks/story-29-migrate-to-nix-crane/01-task-install-nix-on-this-vm.md.
- Re-read the required improve-code-boundaries and tdd skills from disk so this turn follows the mandated workflow.
- Next I need to inspect the task markdown and story context to decide whether this is a TO BE VERIFIED planning turn or a NOW EXECUTE implementation turn.

- Read the active task markdown; it has no TO BE VERIFIED or NOW EXECUTE marker, so the required workflow makes this a planning-only turn.
- Confirmed story-29 currently contains only the task files and no existing execution marker for task 01.
- Next I need enough repo context around Nix/bootstrap state to write a concrete plan file and then stop immediately.

- Gathered repo context for the plan: there are no .nix/flake files yet, and `nix --version` currently fails because Nix is not installed.
- This reinforces that task 01 is pure environment/bootstrap work rather than repo code implementation.
- Next I am checking existing plan-file conventions so I can add a compliant task-01 plan and stop immediately.

- Found the project’s plan-file convention and confirmed plans end with a `Plan path:` line plus either `TO BE VERIFIED` or `NOW EXECUTE`.
- Read representative plans; this task’s plan should explicitly call out the TDD exception because VM setup is a non-code task.
- Next I am gathering OS/user/bootstrap facts so the Nix install plan is concrete about installer choice and validation.

- Collected VM facts for the installation plan: AlmaLinux 9.7 on aarch64, systemd PID 1, sudo available without password, `/nix` and `/etc/nix` currently absent.
- The shell startup files currently source `~/.bashrc` and `~/.cargo/env`; the plan must account for fresh-shell Nix availability without breaking existing profile setup.
- Next I am verifying the current official Nix installer and flakes-enablement guidance before writing the plan and task pointer.

- Verified with official Nix docs that this AlmaLinux VM should use the single-user installer because SELinux is enforcing, despite systemd being available.
- Created and linked the task-01 plan at .ralph/tasks/story-29-migrate-to-nix-crane/01-task-install-nix-on-this-vm_plans/2026-04-28-install-nix-on-this-vm-plan.md, ending it with NOW EXECUTE for the next turn.
- Next turn should read the linked plan, execute the single-user Nix install, enable `experimental-features = nix-command flakes`, run fresh-shell verification plus `make check`, `make lint`, and `make test`, then update the task notes honestly.

- Re-read the active story-29 task, its linked NOW EXECUTE plan, and the required `tdd` plus `improve-code-boundaries` skills.
- Reconfirmed the preflight VM facts: AlmaLinux 9.7 on aarch64, SELinux Enforcing, user `joshazimullah`, `/nix` missing, and no existing `~/.config/nix/nix.conf`.
- Fresh-shell boundary is straightforward: `~/.bash_profile` sources `~/.bashrc` and `~/.cargo/env`; `~/.bashrc` currently has no Nix init. Next I need to update the task notes with these prerequisites, then run the official single-user installer and verify fresh-shell Nix/flakes before repo checks.

- Ran the official single-user installer `bash <(curl -L https://nixos.org/nix/install) --no-daemon` because SELinux is enforcing on this AlmaLinux VM.
- Installer succeeded, created `/nix`, installed `nix (Nix) 2.34.6`, and appended Nix profile hooks to `~/.bash_profile` and `~/.zshrc`.
- Fresh login-shell verification now passes for `command -v nix && nix --version`; I also created `~/.config/nix/nix.conf` with `experimental-features = nix-command flakes`, and `nix config show` plus `nix flake metadata github:NixOS/nixpkgs` succeed from a fresh shell. Next I need to run `make check`, `make lint`, and `make test`, then write the final task notes and completion metadata honestly.
